first_run.rationale: The score is unchanged, and the core reasoning is identical across both evaluations. Both versions correctly identify the significant mismatch between the candidate's experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and the role's requirements (Java, Kotlin, Spring). The change in university from Bucharest to the more prestigious ETH Zürich did not alter the assessment of the candidate's skills or fit, and the minor differences in phrasing are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation.
